block.content: Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of expertise in full-stack web development. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and modern frameworks including React and FastAPI. Strong background in building scalable applications and RESTful APIs.

Senior Backend Engineer - TechCorp (2021-Present) - Designed and implemented microservices architecture using Python and FastAPI - Built RESTful APIs serving 1M+ requests per day - Reduced response times by 40% through optimization and caching strategies - Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews

Full Stack Developer - WebSolutions Inc (2019-2021) - Developed responsive web applications using React and TypeScript - Implemented real-time features using WebSockets and Redis - Collaborated with UX designers to create intuitive user interfaces - Improved application performance by 50% through code splitting and lazy loading

Technical Skills: - Languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL - Frameworks: FastAPI, React, Node.js, Django - Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQLite - Tools: Git, Docker, AWS, CI/CD, Playwright
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science University of Technology (2015-2019) GPA: 3.8/4.0 Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Development, Database Systems
